sections.label: Verse 1
lines: In the depths of darkest night
When shadows close in tight
I lift my voice and cry Lord, don't pass me by
Make haste to help me now
Before my spirit bows

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Deliver me, deliver me
My God, make haste to set me free
Let those who seek my fall
Find nothing here at all
While I, though poor and weak
Find strength in You I seek

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Let those who mock and shame
Find only empty claims
While those who seek Your face
Find shelter in Your grace
Their joy will overflow
As Your salvation shows

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Deliver me, deliver me
My God, make haste to set me free
Let those who seek my fall
Find nothing here at all
While I, though poor and weak
Find strength in You I seek

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Though I am brought so low
This truth I surely know:
You are my help and shield
To You my life I yield

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Deliver me, deliver me
My God, make haste to set me free
Let those who seek my fall
Find nothing here at all While
I, though poor and weak Find glory as I seek
